name: prd-spec-generator
description: Turns a feature description into a verified 9-file PRD — multi-judge consensus, 17 MCP tools.
long_description: Production-grade PRD generator with closed-loop reliability calibration, multi-judge verification against externally-grounded oracles, and mechanically-sealed falsifier protocols. 17 MCP tools, 583 tests, full Phase 4 audit lineage. Runs locally over stdio — no network calls, no telemetry.

tools.name: read_skill_config
tools.description: Read the SKILL.md content that drives PRD generation

tools.name: check_health
tools.description: Check system health — verify all components are accessible

tools.name: get_prd_context_info
tools.description: Get configuration for a specific PRD context type

tools.name: list_available_strategies
tools.description: List thinking strategies available to the pipeline.

tools.name: validate_prd_section
tools.description: Run deterministic Hard Output Rules validation on a single PRD section. Returns violations found — zero LLM calls, pure regex/parsing.

tools.name: validate_prd_document
tools.description: Run full document validation including cross-section checks (SP arithmetic, AC numbering, FR-AC coverage, test traceability). Returns comprehensive validation report.

tools.name: get_quality_history
tools.description: Get historical PRD quality scores from the evidence repository

tools.name: get_strategy_effectiveness
tools.description: Get strategy performance data — actual vs expected improvement, compliance rate

tools.name: coordinate_context_budget
tools.description: Calculate token budget allocation for PRD generation. Returns per-section retrieval limits for Cortex recall, generation budgets, and section-specific query templates. Call this BEFORE starting section generation.

tools.name: map_failure_to_retrieval
tools.description: When validate_prd_section returns violations, call this to get corrective Cortex recall queries. Closes the validation→retrieval feedback loop so retries use better context.

tools.name: start_pipeline
tools.description: Initialize a new PRD pipeline run. Returns run_id and the first NextAction the host must execute.

tools.name: submit_action_result
tools.description: Feed an ActionResult to the pipeline runner; receive the next NextAction.

tools.name: get_pipeline_state
tools.description: Read the current pipeline state by run_id. Supports format: summary (default), full, grounding, or validation.

tools.name: plan_section_verification
tools.description: Extract claims from a PRD section and select judges. Returns JudgeRequest[] the host must execute via Agent tool in parallel.

tools.name: plan_document_verification
tools.description: Same as plan_section_verification but across all sections of a document.

tools.name: conclude_verification
tools.description: Aggregate JudgeVerdict[] from spawned subagents into a VerificationReport (consensus + dissent).
